items.question: Do you offer support for foreign investors?
items.answer: Yes, we specialize in helping foreign investors navigate Tanzanian regulations and set up their businesses.

items.question: How long does company registration take?
items.answer: Company registration typically takes 5-10 business days after all documents are submitted.

items.question: What services does Exxonim offer?
items.answer: We offer business registration, tax compliance, legal advisory, and ongoing compliance management services.

items.question: What documents are needed for registration?
items.answer: You'll need a valid ID/passport, proof of address, and company details. We'll guide you through the full list.

items.question: What are your office hours?
items.answer: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM East Africa Time (EAT).

items.question: How can I track my application?
items.answer: You can track your application using the tracking code provided after submission on our Track Consultation page.

items.question: is this working?
items.answer: yes this is working that is why you see it here
